error.invalid_json: Legacy JSON input must be a valid JSON array
error.invalid_mapping: Use one mapping per line in the documented format

garage_doors.title: Garage doors
garage_doors.description: Enter one garage door per line as zone:name:output. Example: 25:West:1

partitions.title: Partitions
partitions.description: Optional. Enter one controllable partition per line as partition:userNumber[:name]. Example: 1:02:Exterior. The panel guide's arm/disarm command uses a user number plus the code entered in Home Assistant.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Ademco panel
reconfigure.description: Update the serial connection used for the panel.

user.title: Ademco panel
user.description: Set the serial device path and baud rate for the panel connection.

zones.title: Zones
zones.description: Enter one mapping per line as id:name or id:name:latchSeconds. Example: 17:Front or 17:Front:30
